channel.title: GoLand : The IDE for professional development in Go | The JetBrains Blog
channel.description: Developer Tools for Professionals and Teams

item.title: Code like a PIRATE with Junie and GoLand
item.dc:creator: Anna Protsenko
item.description: This is a guest post from John Arundel, a Go writer and teacher who runs a free email course for Go learners.

item.title: GoLand 2026.1 EAP Is Out
item.dc:creator: GoLand Team
item.description: The first GoLand 2026.1 Early Access Program build is now available with new inspections and a refreshed debugger UI.
